title: Getting Things Done
author: David Allen
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A GTD-style workflow diagram: 5 boxes (Capture / Clarify / Organize / Reflect / Engage) connected by arrows in a horizontal flow. The middle 'Engage' box is RED — the moment of doing. -->
  <g transform="translate(160 1300)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- 5 nodes: 5 * 200 = 1000, with 4 gaps of 60 = 240, total 1240. Centered with margin. -->
    <g>
      <!-- Capture -->
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="200" height="120" stroke="#cccccc"/>
      <text x="100" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em">CAPTURE</text>
      <text x="100" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">collect it</text>
      <!-- Arrow -->
      <line x1="200" y1="60" x2="260" y2="60" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <polyline points="250 50 260 60 250 70" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
      <!-- Clarify -->
      <rect x="260" y="0" width="200" height="120" stroke="#cccccc"/>
      <text x="360" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em">CLARIFY</text>
      <text x="360" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">name it</text>
      <!-- Arrow -->
      <line x1="460" y1="60" x2="520" y2="60" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <polyline points="510 50 520 60 510 70" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
      <!-- Organize -->
      <rect x="520" y="0" width="200" height="120" stroke="#cccccc"/>
      <text x="620" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em">ORGANIZE</text>
      <text x="620" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">place it</text>
      <!-- Arrow -->
      <line x1="720" y1="60" x2="780" y2="60" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <polyline points="770 50 780 60 770 70" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
      <!-- Reflect — RED (the meta-step) -->
      <rect x="780" y="0" width="200" height="120" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
      <text x="880" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">REFLECT</text>
      <text x="880" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">review it</text>
      <!-- Arrow -->
      <line x1="980" y1="60" x2="1040" y2="60" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <polyline points="1030 50 1040 60 1030 70" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
      <!-- Engage -->
      <rect x="1040" y="0" width="200" height="120" stroke="#cccccc"/>
      <text x="1140" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em">ENGAGE</text>
      <text x="1140" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">do it</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A return arc from Engage back to Capture (the loop) -->
    <path d="M 1140 120 Q 620 280 100 120" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
    <text x="620" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">REPEAT WEEKLY</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The GTD methodology IS a 5-step flow. The cover is a literal horizontal workflow diagram: Capture → Clarify → Organize → Reflect → Engage. The fourth step, REFLECT (the one Allen insists is most-skipped), is RED 3px — the meta-step. A faint dashed return arc connects Engage back to Capture with 'REPEAT WEEKLY' label. Title sits at the top, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand 'GTD' in the bottom-right; pill '✓' at the top — the final action.
